subject: Public Health
title: Prescription Drug Misuse
description: A fast breakdown of Prescription Drug Misuse for builders.

hook.text: The medicine cabinet is the most dangerous drug supply—prescription misuse kills more than illegal drugs in many.

buildup.text: Benzodiazepines, stimulants, and opioids prescribed for legitimate conditions are misused, shared, and diverted.

discovery.text: Prescription opioid deaths outnumbered heroin and cocaine deaths combined in the US for years before fentanyl surged.

twist.text: Electronic prescribing, drug monitoring programs, and prescriber education can reduce misuse without denying pain.

climax.text: Balancing access to necessary medications with prevention of misuse remains one of medicine's greatest challenges.

punchline.text: The line between medicine and addiction is thinner than most people realize.

quiz.question: What tools help reduce prescription drug misuse?
options: Drug monitoring programs and electronic prescribing
